title: Class 0 E001 emergency baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative E001-aligned emergency path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish an emergency-aligned payload through the same operational ingress plane.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the routing outcome.

notes: Exact threshold semantics remain defined by the frozen policy table.
This scenario is intended for emergency override path validation and later class-wise latency profiling.
